requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety and Tropical Marine Enclosure Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全及热带海洋外壳基线
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全及熱帶海洋外殼基線

summary.en: Maldives EV charger projects should use IEC 61851-1 as the conductive EVSE safety baseline and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations. The marine tropical environment makes enclosure, corrosion, humidity, condensation, UV, and thermal derating evidence central to project acceptance. Outdoor chargers should be specified with appropriate IP protection, corrosion-resistant materials and coatings, cable glands suitable for salt-laden air, drainage and condensation control, and validated operating limits for high heat and humidity. Space-constrained atoll sites also require careful emergency access, bollards or barriers, ventilation clearance, and flood or splash-risk review.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫电动汽车充电项目应以IEC 61851-1作为传导式EVSE安全基线，并以IEC 61851-23覆盖直流充电站。热带海洋环境使外壳、防腐、高湿、冷凝、紫外线和热降额证据成为项目验收重点。室外充电桩应规定适当IP防护、防腐材料和涂层、适用于含盐空气的电缆接头、排水和冷凝控制，以及经验证的高温高湿运行限值。空间受限的环礁场地还须审查应急通道、防撞柱或屏障、通风间距，以及洪水或飞溅风险。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫電動汽車充電項目應以IEC 61851-1作為傳導式EVSE安全基線，並以IEC 61851-23覆蓋直流充電站。熱帶海洋環境使外殼、防腐、高濕、冷凝、紫外線和熱降額證據成為項目驗收重點。室外充電樁應規定適當IP防護、防腐材料和塗層、適用於含鹽空氣的電纜接頭、排水和冷凝控制，以及經驗證的高溫高濕運行限值。空間受限的環礁場地還須審查應急通道、防撞柱或屏障、通風間距，以及洪水或飛濺風險。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental testing: salt mist, cyclic
IEC 62262 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures against external mechanical impacts (IK Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with GB/T connector and communication requirements tied to China domestic deployment. GB/T 18487 evidence may help identify design functions such as protective earthing, insulation monitoring, overcurrent protection, temperature monitoring, and control pilot behavior, but it does not replace IEC 61851 evidence for an IEC-aligned Maldives project. China test reports may also omit salt-mist, high-humidity, or tropical marine derating evidence needed for Maldives sites.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并结合面向中国国内部署的GB/T接口和通信要求。GB/T 18487证据可帮助识别保护接地、绝缘监测、过流保护、温度监测和控制导引行为等设计功能，但不能替代IEC体系马尔代夫项目所需的IEC 61851证据。中国测试报告也可能缺少马尔代夫场地所需的盐雾、高湿或热带海洋降额证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並結合面向中國國內部署的GB/T接口和通訊要求。GB/T 18487證據可幫助識別保護接地、絕緣監測、過流保護、溫度監測和控制導引行為等設計功能，但不能替代IEC體系馬爾地夫項目所需的IEC 61851證據。中國測試報告也可能缺少馬爾地夫場地所需的鹽霧、高濕或熱帶海洋降額證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP and IK certificates, salt-mist or corrosion evidence, thermal derating curves for high humidity and heat, condensation controls, cable and gland ratings, and installation instructions for compact island sites. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough unless mapped clause by clause and supplemented with Maldives environmental evidence.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全报告、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、IP和IK证书、盐雾或防腐证据、高湿高温热降额曲线、冷凝控制、电缆及接头额定值，以及适用于紧凑岛屿场地的安装说明。单独GB/T 18487报告不足以满足要求，除非逐条映射并补充马尔代夫环境证据。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全報告、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、IP和IK證書、鹽霧或防腐證據、高濕高溫熱降額曲線、冷凝控制、電纜及接頭額定值，以及適用於緊湊島嶼場地的安裝說明。單獨GB/T 18487報告不足以滿足要求，除非逐條映射並補充馬爾地夫環境證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-mandatory where IEC 61851, IP, corrosion, or environmental clauses are required by MED, utility, tender, site owner, or insurer; confirm exact edition and site specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Maldives without clause mapping and supplemental environmental testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Maldives deployment needs IEC 61851 safety evidence plus tropical marine durability evidence. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is a design reference, not a substitute for IEC safety reports, corrosion review, IP/IK evidence, and high-humidity thermal derating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马尔代夫部署需要IEC 61851安全证据及热带海洋耐久性证据。GB/T 18487.1-2023是设计参考，不可替代IEC安全报告、防腐审查、IP/IK证据和高湿热降额。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬爾地夫部署需要IEC 61851安全證據及熱帶海洋耐久性證據。GB/T 18487.1-2023是設計參考，不可替代IEC安全報告、防腐審查、IP/IK證據和高濕熱降額。
